blocking_issues.title: Stage 0 task pass gates depend on later-stage acceptance
blocking_issues.resolution: Added S0AC-001 through S0AC-007 as stage-local gates while preserving all AC-* links for their owning stages and final review.

blocking_issues.title: Source validator invalidates its declared package integrity
blocking_issues.resolution: Replaced it with a read-only manifest validator; manifest generation is a separate explicit command and validation checks before/after tree digests.

blocking_issues.title: Atomic one-asset replacement is not backed by the selected platform API
blocking_issues.resolution: Removed the atomic claim and contracted verified serial delete-upload: healthy state exactly one, every state at most one, explicit zero-asset repair after failure, no persistent backup image.

blocking_issues.title: Frozen seven-file plane is not renderable by current shared Governance
blocking_issues.resolution: Pinned an external Governance checkout, added only a project-specific fact adapter, and made byte-identical temporary rendering plus shared gates mandatory.

blocking_issues.title: Frozen public source discloses private repository locators
blocking_issues.resolution: Removed private names from the publishable tree, retained only hashed detection tokens, and prohibited pushing local v1.0.0 history; final upload requires a clean snapshot history.

nonblocking_unknowns.title: One proposed sender seed lacks authoritative public verification
nonblocking_unknowns.resolution: Removed it from the verified seed claim; Stage 3 must keep every unverified candidate UNKNOWN until authoritative or protected Owner evidence exists.

stage_pass_rule: All seven S0AC records PASS, the read-only package and publication validators PASS, pinned shared Governance renders byte-identical documents and all frozen invariants remain unchanged.
next_stage: S1 may start only in a later run; no remote publication is allowed.
